name: cohrint-worker
description: Cohrint ingest + analytics API — Cloudflare Worker

scripts.gen-version: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=require('./package.json').version;fs.writeFileSync('src/_version.ts','// AUTO-GENERATED — do not edit manually. Run: npm run gen-version\nexport const VERSION = '+JSON.stringify(v)+';\n');"
